Komandos debiutas numatytas jau pirmąją čempionato dieną – balandžio 25-ąją. „RDV“ startuos itin rimtu išbandymu, susitikdama su vicečempionais Utenos „Titanais“. Tokia akistata taps puikia proga įvertinti naujokų potencialą realiomis kovinėmis sąlygomis. Šių metų Lietuvos beisbolo čempionate dalyvaus septynios komandos: Kauno „Lituanica“ (dabartiniai čempionai) Utenos „Titanai“ (vicečempionai) BK „Vilnius“ „Vilties liūtai“ Kauno „SM Gaja-Lituanica“ Vilniaus „VBA-Sostinės Tauras“ „RDV“ (debiutantai) „RDV“ atvejis ypač įdomus, nes komanda kuriasi nuo pagrindų. Tokiose situacijose svarbiausia tampa ne tik žaidėjų meistriškumas, bet ir komandos chemija bei trenerio gebėjimas greitai suformuoti vieningą kolektyvą. https://www.baseball.dk/2026/01/12/littl: Little League Denmark West Practices with National Team Coaches – Danish Baseball Federation Little League Denmark West Practices with National Team Coaches Udgivet af Rod Moore den januar 12, 2026 januar 12, 2026 Sunday 11 January 2026 In anticipation of the upcoming Little League baseball season in Denmark, Danish National Team Coaches Carlos Perez (Copenhagen) and Omar Gamara (Odense) were invited to Aarhus, the largest town in the Danish mainland, called Jutland. 20 players aged 8-14 yo from Aarhus, Herning, Odense and Aalborg plus 7 coaches made for a great indoor practice. Danish Baseball Federation president, Rod Moore, said of the event: “We have collected a great group of baseball kids and coaches from all over Denmark to try to launch a Little League West regional division for games to be played between Aarhus, Herning and Odense in 2026. Контакти За нас Откриване на сезон 2023 Откриване на сезон 2023 май 17, 2023 bbsfinfoadmx Страхотно откриване на бейзболен/софтболен сезон 2023. Този уикенд, стадионът се превърна в сърцето на софтболната/бейзболната общност, докато посрещахме новия сезон с огромно вълнение и ентусиазъм. Слънчевото време създаде перфектната атмосфера за спорт и забавление, а стадионът беше изпълнен с емоции и приятели на бейзбола и софтбола. Един от най-вълнуващите моменти от откриването беше Хоъмрън дербито, в което Евгени Черноземски се нареди на върха. Той показа невероятна сила и прецизност, изпращайки топките извън очертанията на терена. Това беше истинско представяне на майсторството и силата на играта. Откриването на сезона беше още по-специално с провеждането на томбола с много награди. Участниците имаха възможност да спечелят страхотни подаръци и сувенири, които ще им напомнят за това незабравимо събитие. Не можем да забравим и срещата между младежките национални отбори. Младите играчи представиха изключителни изпълнения, демонстрирайки бъдещето на нашия спорт. Беше вълнуващо да ги гледаме да дават най-доброто от себе си. https://www.baseball.dk/2025/10/07/littl: Little League Baseball Expands in Denmark – Emergence of Denmark West – Danish Baseball Federation Little League Baseball Expands in Denmark – Emergence of Denmark West Udgivet af Rod Moore den oktober 7, 2025 oktober 7, 2025 For the first time ever, there was a successful Little League International-sanctioned Little League in Denmark with 4 teams playing 12 games each. Not unusually, 3 of the teams were centered around the Copenhagen area. However, some great news was that Aarhus, along with some players from Odense and Herning, developed a competitive DK West team from nearly scratch, starting from the beginning of the season. In November 2024, there were only 6 junior players coming to practice in Aarhus. When the Danish Baseball Federation, with the help of funding from World Baseball Softball Federation Europe (WBSCE), established a “Junior Coaches’ Network” and then, with more funding to establish a bona fidé Little League, a transforming process occurred. DK West coaches networked with elite baseball coaches of the newly formed Danish National Baseball Program (DNBP), bolstering skills and competence in the West. DNBP coach Carlos Perez worked up a 12-game schedule for the 4 teams. Gelof leads Israel past Netherlands in 6-2 victory to end WBC on a high note - Israel Baseball Americas March 15, 2026 Gelof leads Israel past Netherlands in 6-2 victory to end WBC on a high note By Chase Levitt, Israel Baseball News Staff Third baseman Jake Gelof was the hero for Team Israel (2-2) in its final 2026 World Baseball Classic contest on Tuesday, a 6-2 win over the Netherlands (1-3). The game tied was tied 2-2 with two outs in the top of the sixth and the bases loaded when Gelof hit a grounder that snuck through the left-infield gap, giving Israel a 4-2 lead. The next batter, first baseman Matt Mervis, doubled down the left field line to clear the bases, giving Israel a commanding 6-2 lead .
